title: premna obtusifolia var. minor
intro: Premna obtusifolia var. minor, also known as the Chinese clock vine or minor Premna, is a variety of flowering plant in the mint family. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Premna obtusifolia var. minor include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
